ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "conversation_id" INTEGER /* Conversation ID of the tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tweet was created */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the tweet was created */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the tweet was created */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "tweet" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "tweet_type" TEXT /* Type of the tweet (e.g., retweet, reply, quote) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "retweeted_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the retweeted status */,
  "quoted_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quoted status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers of the user */,
  "friends_count" INTEGER /* Number of friends of the user */,
  "listed_count" INTEGER /* Number of lists the user is a member of */,
  "favourites_count" INTEGER /* Number of tweets favourited by the user */,
  "statuses_count" INTEGER /* Number of tweets posted by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag_name" TEXT /* Name of the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet where the mention was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was mentioned */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user who was mentioned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet where the URL was mentioned */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL mentioned in the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urls_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet where the photo was mentioned */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the photo mentioned in the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_photos_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "replies_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the tweet */,
  "retweets_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets of the tweet */,
  "likes_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes of the tweet */,
  "impressions_count" INTEGER /* Number of impressions of the tweet */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate of the tweet */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_metrics_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet related to the topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_topics_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the tweet */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_versions_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)
